title: DevOps tools
text:
The DevOps tools below are commonly found in a build-your-own DevOps tool chain. Many of these can be replaced by GitLab’s single platform for the entire DevOps lifecycle.

Microsoft TFS/VSTS/Asure DevOps

Inflectra Corporation

Atlassian Jira Portfolio

CA Technologies / Rally

IBM Rational Team Concert

HP Application Lifecycle Management

Atlassian Jira Service Desk

CA Service Desk Manager

Source code management

Microsoft TFS/VSTS/Azure DevOps

CA Technologies / Rally

IBM Rational Clear case

Smart Bear Collaborator

Continuous Integration

Microsoft TFS/VSTS/Azure DevOps

Drone.io - New Stack Article

Docker Trusted Registry

Google Cloud Container Registry

Continuous Delivery/Deployment

Electric Cloud ElectricFlow

Microsoft TFS/VSTS/Azure DevOps

CenturyLink Cloud Application Manager

Infrastructure Configuration

Application Performance Monitoring

Meltano is a separate product that isn’t part of GitLab. Here’s a list of BizOps tools. Other lists include cloud native ETL tools (link no longer available), and the Meltano README .
